AUTH.SESSION_EXPIRED: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
AUTH.SESSION_EXPIRING: Your session expires soon. Please save your work.

ERROR.GENERIC: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
ERROR.BAD_REQUEST: Unable to process the request. Please check the data and try again.
ERROR.FORBIDDEN: You do not have permission to perform this action.
ERROR.NOT_FOUND: The requested resource was not found.
ERROR.SERVER_ERROR: Internal server error. Please try again later.
ERROR.CONNECTION: Unable to connect to the server. Check your connection.

CODES.SCHEDULE_NO_OPENING_HOURS: Set up your business hours before opening the schedule.
CODES.SCHEDULE_NO_SERVICES: Add at least one service before opening the schedule.
CODES.SCHEDULE_INCOMPLETE_SETUP: To open the schedule, set up your business hours and add at least one service.
CODES.COMPANY_ALREADY_EXISTS: A company with this data already exists.
CODES.URL_ALREADY_IN_USE: This scheduling URL is already in use.
CODES.INVALID_OPENING_HOURS: The business hours provided are invalid.
CODES.APPOINTMENT_CONFLICT: There is already an appointment at this time.
CODES.APPOINTMENT_ALREADY_CANCELLED: This appointment has already been cancelled.
CODES.SLOT_UNAVAILABLE: This time slot is no longer available.

WELCOME.TITLE: Welcome!
WELCOME.DESCRIPTION: Create your account and start simplifying how your customers make appointments!

PASSWORD.LABEL: Password
PASSWORD.LENGTH: Password must be between 6 and 15 characters
PASSWORD.MIN_LENGTH: Password must be at least 8 characters
PASSWORD.MAX_LENGTH: Password must be at most 30 characters
PASSWORD.PATTERN: Password must contain uppercase, lowercase, number and special character
PASSWORD.REQUIREMENTS: At least 8 characters, one uppercase, one lowercase, one number and one special character

LOGIN.TITLE: Login
LOGIN.WELCOME_TEXT: We're glad to see you again.
LOGIN.AUTO_FILL: Your browser may offer to save this password
LOGIN.LOCKOUT: Too many attempts. Try again in {{seconds}}s.

HOME.TITLE: More than just a schedule
HOME.DESCRIPTION: Streamline how your clients schedule their services while providing a complete management platform.

FEATURES.ACCESS_ANYWHERE_DESC: No need to install an app. Available on any platform: iPhone, Android, Windows, among others...
FEATURES.NOTIFICATIONS_DESC: Send notifications to remind your clients about their appointments, reducing no-show rates and increasing revenue.
FEATURES.SIMPLE_DESC: Your clients don't want to waste time with excessive information. Offer them a simple and straightforward platform that also provides you with complete management of your business.

PRICING.TITLE: Plans

FEATURES.FINANCIAL: Financial report including earnings, expenses, and forecasts

PRICING.FREE_TRIAL: 7-day free trial with no upfront credit card registration

SERVICES.TITLE: Available Services
SERVICES.SUBTITLE: A complete solution for various types of businesses

SCHEDULING.TITLE: Book Appointment

STEP_SERVICE.TITLE: Choose a service
STEP_SERVICE.SUBTITLE: Select the service you would like to book

STEP_PROFESSIONAL.TITLE: Choose a professional
STEP_PROFESSIONAL.SUBTITLE: Select who you would like to see

STEP_DATETIME.TITLE: Pick a date and time
STEP_DATETIME.SUBTITLE: Choose when you would like your appointment
STEP_DATETIME.SELECT_DATE: Select a date to see available times

STEP_CONFIRM.TITLE: Review your booking
STEP_CONFIRM.SUBTITLE: Please confirm your appointment details
STEP_CONFIRM.LOGIN_NOTICE: Please login or continue as guest to complete your booking

SUCCESS.TITLE: Booking Confirmed!
SUCCESS.MESSAGE: Your appointment has been successfully booked.

CLOSED.TITLE: Schedule closed
CLOSED.MESSAGE: This company is not accepting appointments at the moment. Please try again later.

SCHEDULING.NO_TIMES_AVAILABLE: No available time slots for the selected date.

CALENDAR.CANCEL_CONFIRM: Are you sure you want to cancel this appointment?
